info.title: Platform - Object Manager
info.description: The Object Manager APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data for objects created via Object Manager in the OneTrust Platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Model Management
tags.description: The Model Management APIs are used to conduct full management of Model objects.

tags.name: Object Attribute Management
tags.description: The Object Attribute Management APIs are used to manage object attributes.

tags.name: Object Management
tags.description: The Object Management APIs are used to manage objects created via Object Manager, including Projects, Models, and Datasets.

tags.name: Object Relationship Management
tags.description: The Object Relationship Management APIs are used to manage relationships between objects.

tags.name: Object Relationship Type Management
tags.description: The Object Relationship Type Management APIs are used to manage the types of relationships that can exist between objects.

tags.name: Object Task Management
tags.description: The Object Task Management APIs are used to manage tasks associated with objects.

tags.name: Object Type Management
tags.description: The Object Type Management APIs are used to manage custom object types.

tags.name: Project Management
tags.description: The Project Management APIs are used to conduct full management of Project objects.

post.description:
Use this API to create a new Project object record.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports creating Project objects via Object Manager.

Create a basic project.summary: Simple project creation request with minimal details

Create a comprehensive project.summary: Detailed project creation with all available fields

value.name: Enterprise Data Warehouse Migration
value.description: Migration of legacy data warehouse to cloud-based solution
value.intendedUse: Improve data analytics capabilities and reduce operational costs

Created Project Response.summary: Example of a successfully created project
Created Project Response.description: Response containing the details of the newly created project entity

value.name: Data Analytics Platform Development
value.description: Development of an enterprise-wide data analytics platform

Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

post.description:
Use this API to retrieve basic details for the specified Project object record by key terms and filters.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports Project objects created via Object Manager.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results.

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N). Example- '?page=1

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results per page.

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Example- '?size=20

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort criteria that dictates the order of the results.

Query by name pattern.summary: Query projects with names starting with 'Analytics'

Query by priority and deadline range.summary: Find high priority projects with approaching deadlines
Query by priority and deadline range.description: Query by priority and deadline range

Query by completion percentage range.summary: Find projects with completion percentage in a specific range

Query by team assignments.summary: Find projects assigned to specific teams

Query by specific stakeholders.summary: Find projects with specific stakeholder mentions

value.query: (status:Active OR status:"In Progress") AND priority:(High OR Critical) AND completionPercentage:<75 AND deadline:<2025-06-30T00:00:00Z AND NOT name:*Legacy*

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of basic project details matching query

post.description:
Use this API to create a new Model object record.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports creating Model objects via Object Manager.

Basic Model.description: A simple model creation request with minimal required fields

value.name: kyutai/mimi
value.description: Mimi is a high-fidelity audio codec leveraging neural networks.
value.biases: The model has been trained with a few safeguards to try to limit potential toxic usages.
value.limitations: The model has been trained with a few safeguards to try to limit potential toxic usages.

Comprehensive Model.description: A comprehensive model creation request with fairness metrics

Created Model Response.summary: Example of a successfully created model
Created Model Response.description: Response containing the details of the newly created model entity

limitations.value: Requires high computational resources and may have latency issues for real-time processing

Use this API to retrieve basic details for the specified Model object record by key terms and filters.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports Model objects created via Object Manager.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results.

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N). Example- '?page=1

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results per page.

schema.description: Number of records per page (1..50). Example- '?size=20

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort criteria that dictates the order of the results.

Query by name pattern.summary: Query models with names starting with 'Customer'

Query by multiple fairness metrics.summary: Find models with specific fairness metric ranges

Query by model source and creation date.summary: Find models from specific sources created recently
Query by model source and creation date.description: Query by model source and creation date

value.query: modelSource:("Internal Development" OR "Open Source") AND createdDate:[2025-01-01T00:00:00Z TO NOW]

Query models with specific limitations o.summary: Find models that mention specific limitations in documentation
Query models with specific limitations o.description: Query models with specific limitations or biases

Complex query with boolean logic.summary: Advanced query combining multiple conditions with boolean operators

value.query: (name:*Sentiment* OR name:*Classification*) AND modelVersion:2.* AND NOT modelSource:"Third Party" AND (hubReferenceId:SA-* OR hubReferenceId:CLS-*)

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of basic model details matching query

example.name: Document Review Stage
example.description: Stage for reviewing and approving documents

id.description: Workflow Stage Sub-task Identifier

nameKey.description: Workflow Stage Sub-task Name Key. Used for Translation

description.example: Review and validate all contract terms and conditions before approval

descriptionKey.description: Workflow Stage Sub-task Description Key. Used for Translation

required.description: Indicate if Workflow Stage Sub-task is mandatory or not

assigneeId.description: Indicate if Workflow Stage Sub-task Assignee Id

assigneeName.description: Indicate if Workflow Stage Sub-task Assignee Name

examples:
{
 "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
 "name": "Document Review Sub-task",
 "nameKey": "Workflow.SubTask.ReviewContractTerms",
 "description": "Review and validate all Document Review Sub-task",
 "descriptionKey": "Workflow.SubTask.ReviewContractTerms.Description",
 "required": true,
 "assigneeId": "456e7890-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
 "assigneeName": "John Doe",
 "actionType": "REVIEW",
 "actionParameters": "{\"reviewType\": \"legal\", \"priority\": \"high\"}"
}
{
 "id": "234e5678-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
 "name": "Approval Sub-task",
 "nameKey": "Workflow.SubTask.ManagerApproval",
 "description": "Requires Approval Sub-task before proceeding",
 "descriptionKey": "Workflow.SubTask.ManagerApproval.Description",
 "required": true,
 "assigneeId": "567e8901-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
 "assigneeName": "Jane Smith",
 "actionType": "APPROVE",
 "actionParameters": "{\"approvalLevel\": \"manager\", \"timeout\": 48}"
}
